name: flyai
examples_zh: 用飞猪帮我查 8 月 1 日北京到三亚的机票和亚龙湾附近酒店，适合两大一小。
搜索上海周末可去的热门景点门票和演唱会票，并给出飞猪预订入口。
帮我找国庆期间杭州到厦门的机票、酒店和当地一日游套餐。
examples_en: Use Fliggy to search August 1 flights from Beijing to Sanya and hotels near Yalong Bay for two adults and one child.
Find weekend attraction tickets and concert tickets in Shanghai with Fliggy booking options.
Search Fliggy for National Day flights, hotels, and local day tours from Hangzhou to Xiamen.
